posts.author: GianL (Gian Luca Jung)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Community,

I am trying to set up a status change when an Invitee has created a specific meeting with me.
I want to change the status column in the item with the invitees e-mail (they usually match)

Thank you in advance already for your help as I am stuck with this for a while now.

Kind regards from Liechtenstein.
